title: adenosma ovata
intro: Adenosma ovata, also known as Chrysanthemi folium, is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda and Unani. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Adenosma ovata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Adenosma ovata include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
